# Satvik Chachra - AI-Native Full Stack Engineer

## About
Satvik Chachra is an AI Native Full Stack Engineer with 4+ years of experience. He specializes in building AI coding agents, developer tooling, and the platform infrastructure that makes them production-ready.

## Technical Focus & Stack
- AI & ML Systems: AI Agents, LLMs, RAG, Tecton, MLOps, MCP (Model Context Protocol), ACP (Agent Client Protocol)
- Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Rust
- Frontend Engineering: ReactJS, NextJS, Redux, modern HTML/CSS
- Backend Engineering: NodeJS, FastAPI, Flask, Redis, Firebase, Socket.IO
- Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS S3, CI/CD, Docker
- Developer Tools & APIs: VS Code Extensions, JetBrains plugins, AI SDK

## Professional Background
- SDE 2, AI Foundations at Atlassian (2025-present) - Building AI coding agents and developer tooling used by 2K+ engineers daily. Led end-to-end development of an AI-native editor and chat experience across VS Code and JetBrains with ~95% shared code.
- SDE 1, Dev Infra at Atlassian (2024-2025) - ML-driven Predictive Test Case Selection System for CI/CD pipelines. Drove ~99% improvement in p95 prediction API latency (60s → 500ms) using Tecton feature store, Redis, and FastAPI.
- SDE 1, Full Stack at AppyHigh (2022-2023) - Built AI-powered Image Editing (PhotAI) and Cloud-based Storage (ScannerGo) software products scaling to 1M+ users.

## Projects & Awards
- Brainiac Award (Feb 2023) for client-side canvas algorithms (pixel manipulation + B&W API masks) for PhotAI's Background Remover.
- Letter of Appreciation (Jan 2023) for driving 3x performance improvement, and optimizing Core Web Vitals (LCP, INP, and CLS) via code-splitting, caching, etc.
- Talent Star Award (Sep 2022) for building ScannerGo's Redux architecture for Cloud Storage and Socket-based real-time file conversions.

## Content Structure
- / : High-level overview of professional wins and experience
- /about : Detailed technical background, stack, education, and awards
- /projects : Deep dives into selected technical projects (AI agents, intelligent systems, platform infrastructure, developer tooling, software products, etc.)
- /blog : Engineering case studies, explorations of AI Agents and intelligent systems, LLMs, ML, AI, distributed systems, math, and physics

## Education
- Bachelor of Engineering, Computer Science - Chitkara University (2018-2022, 9.83/10 CGPA)
